header.title: Browsers
header.subtitle: Download real Chrome & Firefox builds on demand — installed automatically and ready to launch.

firefox.heading: FlowerBrowser (Firefox engine)
firefox.detectedDesc: Ready. Detected at {{path}}. Profiles set to FlowerBrowser launch real Firefox with proxy, UA, locale, timezone and WebRTC off.
firefox.notDetectedDesc: No system Firefox detected. Download a version below — it installs into the app and FlowerBrowser profiles will launch real Firefox with proxy, UA, locale, timezone and WebRTC off.
firefox.empty: No Firefox versions available (are you offline?).

chrome.heading: SunBrowser (Chrome for Testing)
chrome.subtitle: Real builds — UA, Client-Hints, TLS and workers all genuinely match the version.

errors.catalogUnreachable: Could not reach the browser catalog. Check your internet connection.
